task_description: Block A implementation: Phase 4 (Engineering Document Intelligence utilities), Phase 5 (Tiled OCR Pipeline Interfaces), Phase 6 (Large Drawing Viewer). Creates pure utility modules with tests, service interfaces with mock backends, and viewer components - all gated behind feature flags.

verification.summary: All verification passes: npx tsc --noEmit (0 errors), npx vitest run (5/5 root tests pass), cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run (140 new tests across 5 test files all pass), cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build (succeeds in 7.08s). Tests exercise real extraction logic, config defaults, service CRUD, and feature flag gating - they would break if implementation reverted.
